name: @borjie/dynamic-recipe-authoring
description: Wave 18M — LLM-driven dynamic recipe authoring. Mr. Mwikila composes new Tab, Document, Media, Campaign, and Tool recipes on demand from an operator utterance, validates them against the existing Wave 18B/18C contracts, persists them as draft, and advances them through the catalogue's draft → shadow → live → locked → deprecated lifecycle. See Docs/DESIGN/DYNAMIC_RECIPE_AUTHORING_SPEC.md.
